name: Ubiquiti UniFi U6+
title: Ubiquiti UniFi U6+
title_extended: Ubiquiti UniFi U6+ - Access Point, 1x GbE RJ45 port, 2.4 & 5GHz, 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax, with coverage 140 m²
short_description: U6+ Access Point, 1x GbE RJ45 port, 2.4 & 5GHz, 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax, with coverage 140 m²
description: U6+ Access Point, 1x GbE RJ45 port, 2.4 & 5GHz, 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax, with coverage 140 m²

detailed_description.heading: Introducing the Ubiquiti Access Point U6+
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Access Point U6+ is a compact yet powerful indoor dual-band Wi-Fi 6 access point designed to redefine connectivity standards for small and medium-sized businesses. Building upon the success of its predecessor, the U6 Lite, the U6+ brings higher performance and enhanced dual-band Wi-Fi 6 support, making it an ideal solution for environments that demand robust and reliable internet access. Its compact form factor allows it to blend seamlessly into any office or commercial space without compromising on power or performance. The U6+ is engineered to deliver high-speed connectivity and improved network efficiency, catering to the growing demands of modern business operations.

detailed_description.heading: Seamless Connectivity & PoE Technology
detailed_description.text:
The U6+ is powered by PoE (Power over Ethernet Plus) technology, ensuring a hassle-free installation process with a standard Ethernet cable using the UniFi PoE Switch. This feature eliminates the need for additional power outlets, simplifying deployment and reducing cable clutter. With an operating voltage range from 44 to 57V DC, the U6+ is designed to integrate effortlessly into your existing network infrastructure. This ease of installation is particularly beneficial for businesses looking to expand their network coverage quickly and efficiently without significant downtime or disruption.

PoE+ technology also offers flexibility in placement, allowing the U6+ to be installed in optimal locations to maximize coverage and performance. This is especially advantageous in environments where strategic placement of access points can significantly enhance connectivity, such as large open-plan offices, multi-floor buildings, and areas with challenging layouts. By providing both data and power through a single cable, the U6+ simplifies the installation process, making it accessible for IT administrators and reducing the overall cost of network deployment.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Features & Performance
detailed_description.text:
The U6+ boasts a coverage area of 140 m² (1,500 ft²) and supports over 300 connected devices, making it a reliable choice for businesses seeking robust connectivity solutions. With Wi-Fi 6 (2x2 MIMO) capabilities, it delivers a common maximum throughput rate of 2975.5 Mbps. This high throughput ensures that multiple devices can operate simultaneously without experiencing slowdowns, which is essential for maintaining productivity in busy office environments. The U6+’s ability to handle a large number of connected devices makes it ideal for settings such as conference rooms, retail spaces, and educational institutions where consistent and high-speed internet is a necessity.

The enhanced capabilities of Wi-Fi 6, including improved spectral efficiency and reduced latency, make the U6+ well-suited for applications that require real-time performance, such as video conferencing, VoIP calls, and online collaboration tools. The U6+’s advanced features ensure that these applications run smoothly, providing a better user experience and supporting the overall efficiency of the business. Additionally, the access point’s ability to deliver high-speed connectivity across both 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands ensures that it can support a wide range of devices, from legacy equipment to the latest Wi-Fi 6-enabled gadgets.

detailed_description.heading: Wireless Standards & Versatile Connectivity
detailed_description.text:
Compliant with 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ax Wi-Fi 6 standards, the U6+ supports 2.4GHz 2x2 and 5GHz 2x2 MIMO, delivering a 573 Mbps and 2.4 Gbps radio rate, respectively. The wireless antenna frequency range and gain cover 2.4 - 2.473 GHz (3 dBi) and 5.1 - 5.9 GHz (5.4 dBi), ensuring robust and reliable coverage across diverse environments. This adherence to advanced wireless standards ensures compatibility with a wide range of devices, making the U6+ a versatile solution for modern networking needs.

Equipped with a 1 Gbps Ethernet port, the U6+ offers flexible connectivity options, allowing it to be seamlessly integrated into existing network infrastructures. The device can be managed through Ethernet, Wi-Fi, and Bluetooth, providing multiple options for network configuration and management. This versatility is particularly useful in dynamic environments where network requirements may change frequently. Whether in a corporate office, an educational institution, or a residential complex, the U6+’s advanced wireless standards and flexible connectivity options ensure that it can meet the demands of any network environment.

detailed_description.heading: Effortless Setup & Expansion
detailed_description.text:
Setting up and expanding your network with the U6+ access point is straightforward, thanks to its seamless integration with the UniFi Network Application. This powerful management tool simplifies network bridging and management, offering an intuitive interface that allows administrators to configure and monitor their network with ease. The UniFi Network Application provides real-time insights into network performance, enabling proactive management and quick resolution of any issues that may arise. This centralized management approach is particularly beneficial for businesses with multiple access points, as it ensures consistent performance and security across the entire network. The ability to manage the U6+ through the UniFi Network Application also simplifies the process of scaling the network as the business grows. Whether adding new access points or reconfiguring existing ones, administrators can make changes quickly and efficiently, minimizing downtime and disruption. This flexibility is essential for businesses that need to adapt to changing requirements, such as expanding office spaces, opening new locations, or upgrading to support more devices. The U6+’s ease of setup and management ensures that the network remains robust and scalable, providing reliable connectivity that can keep pace with the demands of the business.

With a maximum power consumption of 9 W and an operating temperature range from -30 °C to 60 °C, the U6+ guarantees optimal performance in a variety of environmental conditions. This robust design ensures that the access point can operate reliably in different settings, from climate-controlled offices to more challenging environments such as warehouses and semi-outdoor areas. The ability to maintain consistent performance across a wide temperature range makes the U6+ suitable for deployment in diverse geographic locations, ensuring that users enjoy reliable connectivity no matter where they are.
